settings.label: Gym Name
settings.info: Used in schema markup and default meta titles.

settings.label: Default share image
settings.info: Used for Open Graph and Twitter Card when no page image is set. Recommended: 1200×630.

settings.label: Default meta description
settings.default: Compound Gym — Houston's premier private strength and performance facility. 24/7 access, elite equipment, personal training, and infrared saunas. No contracts. Join today.
settings.info: Fallback meta description for pages without a specific description.

settings.label: Homepage meta title
settings.default: Compound Gym | 24/7 Private Gym in Houston, TX

settings.label: Homepage meta description
settings.default: Compound Gym is Houston's premier private gym offering 24/7 access, memberships starting at $60/mo, day passes, personal training, and an infrared sauna at 7523 South Fwy, Houston TX 77021.

settings.label: Memberships meta description
settings.default: Join Compound Gym in Houston for $60/mo (no contract) or save with a 6-month or annual membership. 24/7 access, no crowds, infrared sauna included.

settings.label: Day Passes meta description
settings.default: Visit Compound Gym without a commitment. Day passes from $20, weekly access for $50, or monthly drop-in for $100. No contract required.

settings.label: Personal Training meta description
settings.default: Expert 1-on-1 personal training at Compound Gym in Houston. Free 1-hour intro session. Private facility, expert coaches, results-focused programming.

settings.label: About meta title
settings.default: About Compound Gym | Houston's Private Gym

settings.label: About meta description
settings.default: Compound Gym is a private training facility at 7523 South Fwy, Houston TX. Built for serious lifters who want a clean, uncrowded gym with 24/7 access and premium equipment.

settings.label: Contact meta description
settings.default: Get in touch with Compound Gym. Located at 7523 South Fwy, Houston TX 77021. Call, email, or stop by to learn more about memberships and personal training.

settings.label: Apparel collection meta description
settings.default: Shop Compound Gym branded apparel. Rep Houston's premier private gym with tees, tanks, and hoodies built for training.

settings.label: Primary color
settings.info: Used for headings, nav background, and primary buttons.

settings.label: Accent color
settings.info: Used for highlighted elements, badge labels, and call-to-action emphasis.

settings.label: Hours
settings.info: Displayed in the footer and contact page.

settings.label: Google Maps embed URL
settings.info: Paste only the src URL from your Google Maps embed iframe (not the full iframe tag).

settings.label: X (Twitter) handle
settings.info: Without the @ symbol. Used for Twitter Card meta tag.

settings.label: Main navigation menu
settings.info: Create a menu called 'main-menu' in Shopify Admin → Navigation.

settings.label: Footer navigation menu
settings.info: Create a menu called 'footer' in Shopify Admin → Navigation.
